verses.text: Against mount Seir (Edom): God will stretch out His hand and make it desolate. Judgment declared. The old enemy of Israel is not forgotten by God.
Against mount Seir (Edom): God will stretch out His hand and make it desolate. Judgment declared. The old enemy of Israel is not forgotten by God.
Against mount Seir (Edom): God will stretch out His hand and make it desolate. Judgment declared. The old enemy of Israel is not forgotten by God.
Against mount Seir (Edom): God will stretch out His hand and make it desolate. Judgment declared. The old enemy of Israel is not forgotten by God.
Because Edom had 'a perpetual hatred' and shed Israel's blood in their calamity, blood shall pursue them. Hatred repaid. Long-cherished malice ripens into ruin.
Because Edom had 'a perpetual hatred' and shed Israel's blood in their calamity, blood shall pursue them. Hatred repaid. Long-cherished malice ripens into ruin.
He will make Seir most desolate, fill its mountains with the slain, and lay it waste for ever. Total judgment. The mountain that delighted in death is filled with it.
He will make Seir most desolate, fill its mountains with the slain, and lay it waste for ever. Total judgment. The mountain that delighted in death is filled with it.
He will make Seir most desolate, fill its mountains with the slain, and lay it waste for ever. Total judgment. The mountain that delighted in death is filled with it.
Because Edom said, 'These two nations shall be mine,' though the LORD was there, He will deal according to their envy. Coveting God's land. To seize what God has claimed is to provoke Him.
Because Edom said, 'These two nations shall be mine,' though the LORD was there, He will deal according to their envy. Coveting God's land. To seize what God has claimed is to provoke Him.
Because Edom said, 'These two nations shall be mine,' though the LORD was there, He will deal according to their envy. Coveting God's land. To seize what God has claimed is to provoke Him.
Because Edom said, 'These two nations shall be mine,' though the LORD was there, He will deal according to their envy. Coveting God's land. To seize what God has claimed is to provoke Him.
As Edom rejoiced at Israel's desolation, so God will make Edom desolate. Measure for measure. Those who gloat over God's people meet the same fate they wished on them.
